data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of retainage tracking (holding back 10% until completion). However, while the linked use case mentions a retainage amount of $682, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates how this is tracked or managed within the system. The absence of specific API endpoints or data that confirm the functionality of retainage tracking indicates a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or state checks confirming retainage tracking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint for retainage tracking validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that retainage is tracked and managed according to the specified requirement.
